title: Multi-color fluorescence live-cell imaging in Dictyostelium discoideum.
author: Hashimura H Kuwana S Nakagawa H Abe K Adachi T Sugita T Fujishiro S Honda G Sawai S
content: S-EPMC11930779 PMC11930779 Multi-color fluorescence live-cell imaging in Dictyostelium discoideum. The cellular slime mold Dictyostelium discoideum, a member of the Amoebozoa, has been extensively studied in cell and developmental biology. D. discoideum is unique in that they are genetically
